mapper.select:
SELECT NEWS_IDX, HOMEPAGE_ID, TITLE, SUB_TITLE, replace(CONTENTS, chr(10), '
') AS CONTENTS, FILE_NAME, PRINT_SEQ, TO_CHAR(ADD_DATE, 'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mm') AS ADD_DATE, USE_YN, LINK_URL, IMG_FILE_NAME, REAL_FILE_NAME, FILE_EXTENSION, FILE_SIZE FROM CMS_NEWS WHERE HOMEPAGE_ID = #{homepage_id} AND USE_YN = 'Y' AND ${search_type} LIKE '%'||#{search_text}||'%' ORDER BY PRINT_SEQ ASC

SELECT NEWS_IDX, HOMEPAGE_ID, TITLE, SUB_TITLE, CONTENTS, FILE_NAME, PRINT_SEQ, TO_CHAR(ADD_DATE, 'yyyy-mm-dd hh24:mm') AS ADD_DATE, USE_YN, LINK_URL, IMG_FILE_NAME, REAL_FILE_NAME, FILE_EXTENSION, FILE_SIZE FROM CMS_NEWS WHERE HOMEPAGE_ID = #{homepage_id} AND NEWS_IDX = #{news_idx}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM CMS_NEWS WHERE homepage_id = #{homepage_id} AND use_yn = 'Y'
AND ${search_type} LIKE '%'||#{search_text}||'%'
